prompt: Create a dramatic square fantasy portrait titled around the theme of Light and Shadow: a female knight shown from the torso up, centered, with her body split into two opposing halves. The left half is luminous and fiery, with wild flowing golden blonde hair blown outward, warm cream background, orange and magenta paint splashes, and bright high-contrast highlights. The right half is dark and gothic, with deep black-blue hair, navy ink washes, a gloomy castle silhouette in the background, and a vertical sword standing beside her shoulder. She wears ornate engraved black-and-silver medieval armor with a decorative cross-like chest ornament, rendered with gritty ink texture, halftone dots, scratches, splatters, and mixed-media brushwork. Add exactly 2 opaque rectangular face-obscuring blocks: one large warm beige-to-dark-brown square centered over the left/middle face, and one dark navy-to-gray vertical rectangle over the right face, slightly smaller and positioned higher-right. Use a dynamic fashion-illustration/comic-poster style with explosive paint splashes, rough paper texture, sharp contrast, and no readable text or watermark.
